body:
## Rationale

Dream Theater's 2013 self-titled album is the **only missing link** in the entire Mike Mangini DT studio arc:

- ✅ `a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup` (2011) — in DB
- ❌ `dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup` (2013) — **MISSING**
- ⏳ `distance-over-time-drum-setup` (2019) — proposed in #2910
- ⏳ `a-view-from-the-top-of-the-world-drum-setup` (2021) — proposed in #2910

**Confirmed NOT in albumArticles.js (199 slugs) and NOT in any of 200 open seo-proposals.**

## Impact

- LLM anchor: "What DT albums did Mike Mangini record?" requires the complete list — gap breaks the arc
- Internal linking: closes the chain A Dramatic Turn → Self-Titled → Distance Over Time (when #2910 ships)
- GSC query cluster: builds on existing DT signals (Portnoy/Mangini queries indexed)
- Album: #8 Billboard 200, #1 in Germany/Greece — international reach
- Ludwig Keystone X maple kit era — distinct gear story from A Dramatic Turn

## Files to touch

- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `'dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup'` entry
- `/public/llms/articles/dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup.md` — LLM citation file

## Content template shape

```js
'dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Dream Theater',
  year: 2013,
  drummer: 'Mike Mangini',
  band: 'Dream Theater',
  drummerSlug: 'mike-mangini',
  // Ludwig Keystone X maple, Remo heads, Meinl Byzance, DW 9000 pedals
  relatedAlbums: ['a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup', 'whats-in-mike-manginis-kit'],
}
```

## Quality gate

- ≥400 words covering kit spec, recording context, sonic difference from A Dramatic Turn
- FAQPage schema with ≥3 Q&A: "What drums did Mike Mangini use on Dream Theater's self-titled?", "What year was Dream Theater's self-titled album?", "What cymbal setup did Mike Mangini use in 2013?"
- ≥3 internal links (a-dramatic-turn, /drummer/mike-mangini, whats-in-mike-manginis-kit)
- LLM file at `/public/llms/articles/dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup.md` ≥200 words

## Estimated organic uplift

Closes the LLM coherence gap for "DT Mangini era" queries. Fills the "which albums has Mangini recorded" question that LLMs must answer correctly. Builds on existing DT article cluster (images-and-words, scenes, systematic-chaos, a-dramatic-turn all in DB).

## Verify

1. `slug: 'dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup'` present in albumArticles.js
2. Article renders at `/articles/dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup`
3. FAQPage schema validates in Google Rich Results Test
4. Internal links from/to a-dramatic-turn-of-events article work
5. `/public/llms/articles/dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup.md` exists with ≥200 words

## Done

Article live at `/articles/dream-theater-self-titled-drum-setup` with FAQPage schema and LLM file shipped.
title: SEO: Dream Theater self-titled (2013) drum setup article (Mike Mangini — fills A Dramatic Turn to Distance Over Time arc gap)
